slides.headline: 3 trades who should NOT get an AI receptionist.
slides.body: Serious. If this is you, keep your money. Swipe.

slides.headline: You answer every call. Every time.
slides.body: On the roof. Under the sink. 9pm Sunday. If you genuinely never miss one — you don't need us.

slides.headline: You're turning work away.
slides.body: Booked out till autumn, waiting list at the gate? Catching more calls just makes the list longer.

slides.headline: You hate the idea of more jobs.
slides.body: Some lads are happy with the van, the radio and a steady week. Honestly — fair play.

slides.headline: Everyone else? You're paying for a receptionist already. In lost jobs.
The phone rings either way.
slides.body: The only question is whether it's answered — by you, by no one, or by something that never sleeps.

slides.headline: Not sure which one you are?
slides.body: The free 60-second audit will tell you. Link in bio.
slides.save: Save this — or send it to the mate who 'answers everything'
